channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: The best Motorola Razr (2026) preorder deals — how to score early discounts on the innovative flip phones
item.description: The Motorola Razr 2026 lineup officially hits store shelves on May 21st, but there are plenty of early deals available for the folks who don't want to wait.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 camcorder mode with Rotate to Zoom
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 camcorder mode with Rotate to Zoom
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 camcorder mode with Rotate to Zoom

item.title: Google may be cutting free Gmail storage for new accounts down to 5GB
item.description: Google may reduce free Gmail storage for new accounts from 15GB to 5GB.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Drive home page on the web
media:content.media:text: Google Drive home page on the web
media:content.media:title: Google Drive home page on the web

item.title: Googlebook won’t be locked to Intel as Qualcomm and MediaTek join the AI laptop push
item.description: Qualcomm has confirmed that its Arm-based chips will power Googlebooks, breaking years of Windows exclusivity.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Googlebook's main highlight
media:content.media:text: Googlebook's main highlight
media:content.media:title: Googlebook's main highlight

item.title: The best Motorola Razr Fold preorder deals — how to buy the innovative foldable
item.description: It's official: the Motorola Razr Fold is finally available for preorder, and I've gathered all of the best early offers into this guide.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:text: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.
media:content.media:title: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.

item.title: This Canvas art TV is normally $1,000, but it just got a $400 PRICE DROP at Best Buy
item.description: The Hisense Class S7 Series is perfect for art lovers who love a softer display.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: A tv on a home wall above a media console
media:content.media:text: A tv on a home wall above a media console
media:content.media:title: A tv on a home wall above a media console

item.title: I've tested the Motorola Razr Fold for two weeks, and Samsung has a new reason to be nervous
item.description: Motorola's new Razr Fold is the company's first book-style foldable, and after two weeks of testing, we have high hopes for the company's foldable prospects.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The Motorola Razr Fold on black crystal rocks
media:content.media:text: The Motorola Razr Fold on black crystal rocks
media:content.media:title: The Motorola Razr Fold on black crystal rocks

item.title: This simple Google Search trick removes all the AI bloat
item.description: Google Search has a lot of unnecessary AI features and bloat cluttering up the actual search results, but there's an easy way to get around all of that. With Google Search Web mode, you get ten blue links to every query, just like it used to be.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Google Search Web mode on a Find X9 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Google Search Web mode on a Find X9 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Google Search Web mode on a Find X9 Ultra

item.title: Galaxy S24 user endures a nightmare, phone goes up in flames during use
item.description: A Galaxy S24 user reported that their phone went up in flames while they were using it, and Samsung has responded.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Amber Yellow Samsung Galaxy S24 colorway and its vibrant display
media:content.media:text: The Amber Yellow Samsung Galaxy S24 colorway and its vibrant display
media:content.media:title: The Amber Yellow Samsung Galaxy S24 colorway and its vibrant display

item.title: Honor, Vivo might've started on 'Wide' foldables to compete with Samsung
item.description: So it begins; rumors allege other Chinese OEMs are working on wider foldables to compete with Samsung's rumored phone.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Honor Magic V5 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Honor Magic V5 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Honor Magic V5 review on Android Central

item.title: Meta's Muse Spark arrives on AI Glasses Gen 1, Ray-Ban Display waits for now
item.description: Muse Spark received two important updates: one for mobile app users and another that puts it in smart glasses.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: A close-up of the Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses' logos
media:content.media:text: A close-up of the Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses' logos
media:content.media:title: A close-up of the Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses' logos

item.title: Meta Connect 2026 confirmed for September, and we're thinking AI and Quest
item.description: Meta Connect 2026 date was revealed, as well as what consumers can expect, which is all about AI and VR.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Quest 2 with a Meta logo on front
media:content.media:text: The Quest 2 with a Meta logo on front
media:content.media:title: The Quest 2 with a Meta logo on front

item.title: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide sounds great until you look at the cameras
item.description: Samsung’s Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide may finally fix the Fold’s awkward narrow screen, but ditching the zoom camera could make it feel less flagship.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.
media:content.media:text: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.
media:content.media:title: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.

item.title: Time for a smart home upgrade — Amazon cuts 23% off the price of the latest Echo Show 11 smart display
item.description: The Echo Show 11 is perfect for easy smart home control, music, and more.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Amazon Echo Show 11 (2025) lifestyle render
media:content.media:text: Amazon Echo Show 11 (2025) lifestyle render
media:content.media:title: Amazon Echo Show 11 (2025) lifestyle render

item.title: The OnePlus 15R is a battery life beast, and it just scored a record-smashing discount at Amazon
item.description: Amazon is slashing a straight $100 off the OnePlus 15R, knocking the price of the 512GB phone down to its lowest price ever recorded.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Holding a mint green OnePlus 15R in front of a pine tree
media:content.media:text: Holding a mint green OnePlus 15R in front of a pine tree
media:content.media:title: Holding a mint green OnePlus 15R in front of a pine tree

item.title: I’ve waited years for Apple to fix iPhone-to-Android texting, and it’s finally happening
item.description: Apple and Google finally fixed one of texting’s biggest problems by bringing encrypted RCS chats to iPhone and Android users with iOS 26.5 beta.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Messages and iMessage logos
media:content.media:text: Google Messages and iMessage logos
media:content.media:title: Google Messages and iMessage logos

item.title: Honor for Android 17 Beta 3 sees developers get on board with the Magic 8 Pro
item.description: Honor announced that it's getting into Android 17 Beta 3 with developers, and its Magic 8 Pro will be among the first in the industry to test it.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The gold Honor Magic 8 Pro next to a katana
media:content.media:text: The gold Honor Magic 8 Pro next to a katana
media:content.media:title: The gold Honor Magic 8 Pro next to a katana

item.title: OxygenOS 16.1 unlocks a smarter, more secure and personal OnePlus 15
item.description: OnePlus announced that its OxygenOS 16.1 patch is finally rolling out for users with the OnePlus 15, bringing several meaningful updates.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The back of the Sand Storm OnePlus 15 on a tan bench
media:content.media:text: The back of the Sand Storm OnePlus 15 on a tan bench
media:content.media:title: The back of the Sand Storm OnePlus 15 on a tan bench

item.title: The Vivo X300 FE is a standout compact flagship — there's just one issue
item.description: The Vivo X300 FE is a good choice if you don't need the X300 Pro's cameras and want something a little easier to use. There's just one problem — it costs way too much.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Vivo X300 FE review
media:content.media:text: Vivo X300 FE review
media:content.media:title: Vivo X300 FE review

item.description: Google has shared new details about how Magic Pointer works in Chrome.

item.title: Google just revealed what comes after Chromebooks — and it's called Googlebook

item.title: Not just an OS: Gemini Intelligence shines with Android automation this summer
item.description: Gemini Intelligence and Google's agentic AI plans took center stage during the Android Show 2026, and there are huge features on the way this summer.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Gemini Era graphic from Google.

item.title: Google is finally treating Android creators seriously with Android 17
item.description: Android 17 adds creator-focused features like AI editing tools, Screen Reactions, better Instagram uploads, and Adobe Premiere support

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.description: Google is finally making Android sharing and iPhone switching less painful.

item.title: Android Auto gets a fresh take on Google Maps navigation, teases more Gemini at the Android Show
item.description: The Android Show 2026 revealed Google's major personal and AI-fueled plans for Android Auto, giving drivers a refined hands-free experience.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google maps receives a visual update for Android Auto, introducing "Immersive Navigation" for a more robust 3D view of the world around your car.
media:content.media:text: Google maps receives a visual update for Android Auto, introducing "Immersive Navigation" for a more robust 3D view of the world around your car.
media:content.media:title: Google maps receives a visual update for Android Auto, introducing "Immersive Navigation" for a more robust 3D view of the world around your car.

item.title: I didn't think the desktop cursor needed reinventing — Googlebooks are proving me wrong
item.description: Is Android's desktop mode just going to feel like a blown-up version of Android on your phone? No, and Magic Pointer is one of the reasons why.

item.title: Google wants Gemini to take over how you browse in Chrome

item.title: Motorola Razr Plus 2026 vs. Razr Plus 2025: Differences you can't see
item.description: The Motorola Razr Plus 2026 is an exciting new entry into Motorola's foldable portfolio, but is it really better than the 2025 model? We break it down for you.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Plus 2026 cover screen
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Plus 2026 cover screen

item.title: I test audio products for a living, and between the Sony's WH-1000XM6 and Bose QC Ultra Headphones (2nd Gen), this is what I think you should buy
item.description: It's easy to compare ANC performance, but there's so much more to consider when looking at the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs the Bose QC Ultra (2nd Gen).
item.author: klpmediallc@gmail.com (Tshaka Armstrong)
item.dc:creator: Tshaka Armstrong

media:content.media:description: The Bose QC Ultra headphones (2nd Gen) on the left and on the right, the Sony WH-1000XM6

item.title: The 'fantastic' Nothing Phone (3) is one of the most eye-catching devices on the market — and it just scored a major discount at Best Buy

item.title: Yes, it's real — new Verizon deal gives your family four free phones AND unlimited wireless for only $25 per line
